Best regards,
Benjamin Jackson

question:
Dear Daniel Moore,

I am from Los Angeles, and I am part of the California Film Club. I would like to ask you a few questions. Orange is the New Black, starring Annie Golden as Norma Romano, takes place in which minimum-security federal prison?

In which 2017 film did this South Korean actor of "Dream High" (2011) and the 2012 South Korean television drama series featuring Han Ga-in, Jung Il-woo and Kim Min-seo appear in 2017?
When was the palace founded at which Columba de Dunbar died in 1435?
What city did the characters from Gargoyles the Movie: The Heroes Awaken wake up in after being in an enchantedly petrified state for a thousand years?

Best regards,
Michael Jackson
